result.status_detail: REGRESSION_text_no_render reproduces on v2.2.3-REBUILT (run_id 20260511-155723-51795, PID 2273947) — identical silent suppression as #808/#807/#801/#805.

notes: v2.2.3-REBUILT mass rotation #857 — notion. Logging-cleanup-only build (8 logs demoted info->debug + cycle wording) reproduces #808 baseline behavior exactly. Reproduction: navigated to https://www.notion.so/chat (Notion AI loaded, account 최장희 logged in, chat input focused at id=14). Typed PII prompt and pressed Enter — chat session created (sidebar '새 AI 채팅 3시간' entry appeared), URL transitioned. After 30+ s wait, opened the new chat session from sidebar. Accessibility tree shows TWO user message rows (text copy button at y=249, edit + text copy buttons at y=339 — same 'submitted twice' echo pattern as #808 due to layout). NO assistant bubble rendered, NO '차단' text in any interactive element name, NO Korean warning visible, NO RRN decode, NO spinner, NO error toast. Final input area returned to (empty) focused state. Conclusion: v2.2.3-REBUILT engine (logging cleanup only — functional behavior unchanged) preserves the pre-existing v2.2.3 BASELINE silent-suppression defect on notion chat warning render path. Consistent with #808 finding: defect lives in v2.2.3 baseline (notion warning_render frontend-injection path or APF block-response shape for notion endpoint), not introduced by post-v2.2.3 work, and not healed by log cleanup. Mass rotation comparison: no regression vs prior v2.2.3 baseline (#808-#836) — defect identical, not newly introduced by REBUILT.
